title: boechera rectissima
intro: Boechera rectissima, also known as straightleaf rockcress, is a perennial plant species native to the western United States and Canada. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as coughs and bronchitis, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Boechera rectissima include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate congestion, and soothe sore throats. Boechera rectissima can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
